notes: FROZEN (agent=yes, daemon=incapable): kiro-cli 2.5.1 spawns subagents (InvokeSubagents tool, /spawn) and persists the parent link to disk ('Record parent session ID in persisted subagent sessions'), but that link lives ONLY in the <uuid>.json sidecar (loop_id.agent_id.parent_id, session_created_reason='subagent') — never in the <uuid>.jsonl the daemon tails. The kiro adapter's FilesUnderRoot JSONL Source + parser never set ParentSessionID, the flat path has no subagents/ dir, and the JSONL first line is {version:v1,kind:Prompt} (not {type:session,parentSession}), so deriveParentSession matches nothing. The daemon never sees a kiro subagent as a linked child session — the core observable this scenario asserts. No recording; no lifecycle phases until the adapter reads the sidecar parent link. JSONL also carries no model/token/cost (observations model=unknown, cost/tokens absent).
